field_values.action_summary: The group arrives at the massive, emerald-studded gates of the Emerald City. They encounter the Guardian of the Gates, who presents the first obstacle to their entry.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots showing scale of gates and walls; Low-angle shots of group looking up at Guardian; Close-ups of emerald embellishments on gate
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Gate height must remain massive relative to character heights
Background city glare/brightness must be consistent across shots
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the overwhelming scale and visual intensity of the Emerald City through massive architectural elements and emerald-studded textures. The sequence must transition from awe at the city's grandeur to apprehension as the group faces a gatekeeper obstacle.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- guardian_of_the_gates

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_gates

## Continuity Constraints
- Gate height must remain massive relative to character heights.
- Background city glare/brightness must be consistent across shots.

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the gates (Awe)
- BT002: Visual immersion in emerald detail (Texture/Scale)
- BT003: Confrontation with the Guardian (Apprehension)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
